zh.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay於大約1067年出生在法國。她於1090年之前與Hugh de Lusignan VII在法國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1144年在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay于大约1067年出生在法国。她于1090年之前与Hugh de Lusignan VII在法国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1144年在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lezay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of French   Ledet  . This surname is found mainly in LA and TX, and is borne mainly by African Americans. Compare   Lada   5.
In some cases possibly also French: variant, with fused masculine definite article le, of Day , a habitatonal name from Day in the Ardennes.

variants.name: Ledet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

nameMeanings.name: Saracena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from the town called Taracena in central Spain (Guadalajara).

en.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay was born about 1067, in France. She married Hugh de Lusignan VII before 1090, in France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1144, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay est née environ 1067, à France. Elle a épousé Hugh de Lusignan VII avant 1090, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1144, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay wurde um 1067 in Frankreich geboren. Sie hat vor 1090 in Frankreich Hugh de Lusignan VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1144 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay è nata il circa 1067 nel Francia. Lei sposato Hugh de Lusignan VII prima del 1090, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1144, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezayは約1067年にフランスで生まれた。1090年以前にフランスでHugh de Lusignan VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1144年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay(은)는 대략 1067년 프랑스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1090년 이전 프랑스에서 Hugh de Lusignan VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay nasceu aproximadamente 1067, em França. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Lusignan VII antes 1090, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1144, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay родилась около 1067 г. в местности Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Lusignan VII перед 1090 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1144 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Saracena de Lezay nació aproximadamente 1067, en Francia. Se casó con Hugh de Lusignan VII antes de 1090, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1144, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 78 años.
